top3.title: Certified mean-blind codes by SVD of the measured leak operator L(z1) (finer #3)
top3.why: Highest payoff x decisiveness x cheapness: because D = 4Re(C-bar S-tilde) is exactly linear in the code (measured 5e-16), the whole mean channel is one 121x120 operator whose bottom singular subspace gives codes with certified beyond-band blindness — jointly over a z1 tolerance band — and the operator is directly measurable on the bench as a calibration. If the 50-min kill test passes, the T1 headline dent (wall leaks 0.7-9%) inverts into the program sledgehammer: the wall becomes a calibratable, numbered property, the natural core of the next paper, and the bench protocol gains a self-calibration step. Explicit merge: this absorbs the constructive residue of three killed ideas (pupil apodization — measured rim-effect kill tells the SVD where the floor lives; leaky Rank-Jet — the rank-<=M framing; z1-diversity spectroscopy — leak-as-calibrated-operator). It is distinct from the dead detection-optimal-code line: objective is mean-channel null-space blindness with covariance power as a constraint, not covariance-power tuning.

top3.title: Two exact walls: energy-conservation null at the collection plane + jet-order invariance (higher #1)
top3.why: The only surviving idea that could RESTORE AN EXACT physical wall: a phase-only object change under lossless full-aperture collection is invisible to the bucket at every order (energy conservation) — an exact mirror of the code-algebra wall at the DMD plane, each with its own geometric softening knob (z1 defocus vs NA clipping). Plus the jet-order invariance sweep pre-empts the strongest referee attack ('your contact orders m=1/m=2 are model artifacts') with a measured invariance. Both outcomes of the slope test are publishable (invariance hardens the frozen theorem; violation = discovered geometric jet-order interpolation, bigger). 35 GPU-min, both arms on existing wave_twin.py.

top3.title: Segmented-bucket P^2 detection law — quadrant diode closes the wave-vs-sealed speed gap (stranger #7)
top3.why: One cheap component (quadrant/4x4 diode) attacks the report's most damaging quantitative deviation: single-bucket grain averaging (lambda ~ 1/N_grains, measured 35x) starves the covariance channel. P segments each see N_grains/P grains and stack into a PM-dim statistic: lambda_tot ~ P^2/N_grains, T_det ~ N_g/P^2 — P=4 alone recovers ~16x toward the sealed regime, staying at <=16 scalars so imaging rank-collapse is untouched. Explicit merge: this is the corrected survivor of the killed F-pixel idea (which self-contradicted on 1/F vs 1/F^2) and the killed matched-grain stop-down (unreachable grain regime); the kill test MUST carry the F-pixel refutation lesson forward — measure per-segment beyond-band mean leak (window-smearing of in-band code into the witness annulus) as an added kill condition, not just lambda_mean flatness, and respect the PM-dim covariance-estimation sample floor (M=16 fallback).

immediate_tests: 1. (35 min, higher #1 both arms — FIRST because arm (ii) can restore an EXACT wall) Phase-bump object change + full-aperture vs NA-clipped bucket in wave_twin.py, plus epsilon sweep {1,2,4,8}% x z2 {0.5,1,5,20}mm slope fit on twin_pool.py. Decisions: exact null <1e-12 with eps^1 restoration under clipping => second exact wall confirmed, two-wall symmetry enters transfer paragraph and next-paper frame; null fails => single-wall narrative stands, drop the symmetry claim. Slopes all in [0.9,1.15] => contact orders are physical (referee defense secured); clear trend vs z2 => geometric jet-order interpolation discovered, escalate to flagship follow-up.

2. (10 min, nextpaper #9) Floor decomposition + leak-law fit on t1_wall_leak.py: fill=1.0, 2x macro-pixel, extended z1 grid {0.5,3,7,15}mm, relay-pupil 3-NA variant. Decisions: floor decomposes (fill/staircase terms move >20%) => L_pix = 6.8e-3 is quotable as a DMD instrument constant + relay-NA spec for the bench; does NOT decompose => floor is a twin grid artifact, transfer paragraph keeps only the bracket [6.8e-3, 8.9e-2] and ideas 3/4 retarget. (Carries the killed small-z1-law lesson: no linear-vs-quadratic claim without the sub-mm points this grid adds.)

3. (8 min, stranger #8) Leak-law stability: t1_wall_leak.py at 3 code seeds x M in {8,32}, fit (a,p) of leak(z1)=L_pix + a*z1^p. Decision: (a,p) stable <15% and all points within 10% => 'reproducible instrument constant' wording allowed in the transfer paragraph; unstable => bracket-only wording. Cross-check the fitted mechanism against the proven 4Re(C-bar S-tilde) factorization (finer #2) — never attribute the law to a 2k_p edge.

4. (50 min, finer #3 — the sledgehammer gate) Build L(z1) for z1 in {0,2,5,10}mm (120 columns, batched), stack beyond-band blocks, SVD; then covariance-retention run (mid z2=5mm, l_c=50, M=32 SVD codes vs random, 200 banks). Decisions: bottom-64 joint leak <=1e-4 AND lambda within 3x of random => certified-blind codes = next-paper core + bench calibration step; KILL (leak >=1e-3 or lambda drop >3x) => floor is code-independent, hardware concentration (test 5) becomes the only wall-restoration route.

5. (20 min, finer #4) DPSS/LP-optimized render kernel + object window, witness at k in [12,14], deterministic z1 sweep {0,1,5,10,20}mm on the finer_t1b harness. Decisions: leak <=1e-3 uniform => hardware concentration route lives and stacks multiplicatively with test 4's code subspace; KILL => window-alias floor is not concentration-limited, hardware wall-restoration dead — if test 4 also killed, the transfer paragraph states the leak as a calibrated floor, full stop.

6. (15 min, stranger #7) Segmented-bucket P in {1,4,16} re-reduction of twin_pool fields at mid z2=5mm lc50 and near-contact z2=1mm, eps {2,5}%, PLUS per-segment beyond-band mean-leak audit (mandatory add from the F-pixel kill). Decisions: exponent >=1.5, P=4 buys >=6x, per-segment mean leak stays below covariance d' => quadrant diode goes in the bench spec and the P^2 law seeds the next paper; KILL (exponent <1.5, or segment windowing floods the witness annulus, or PM-dim estimation erases the gain even at M=16) => single-bucket bank counts stand, bench is slower but the spec stays simple.

7. (40 min, stranger #6) Contact-arm coincidence veto: three pools at relay z2_eff=0 and z2=5mm (H0, 5% scene change, medium events l_c 50->45 / sigma_phi 2pi->1.8pi), 2D coincidence rule thresholded on H0 only. Decisions: medium-event contact-arm AUC ~0.5, coincidence FA <=0.05 at >=0.9x single-arm power => the campaign's only failed gate (FA 0.096/0.084) is repaired by a hardware identity — flip mirror enters the bench, sentence enters the transfer paragraph; KILL (contact arm responds to medium >0.55, or >20% power cost, or scene leak too weak to witness) => fall back to the quarantined semiparametric/cross-fit statistical repair.

8. (12 min, finer #5) Dither-render leak: ordered-dither/error-diffusion at mirror pitch for a+/a-, z1=0 and 10mm annulus profiles. Decisions: dither leak >=1e-2 => PWM temporal dithering + exact whole-period bucket integration becomes a hard line in the apparatus spec; <1e-3 => dithering is a non-issue, PWM constraint dropped. Either way one numbered sentence in the bench doc.

9. (10 min, optional confirm, finer #2 residual) Repeat the carrier-cross exactness sweep at M=32 and 4096^2 grid for grid-independence of the no-2k_p-edge result before the report correction is frozen. Decision: confirms => WAVE_TWIN_REPORT §1 mechanism sentence corrected with confidence; deviates => flag grid sensitivity before quoting annulus profiles.
transfer_wording: Mechanism sentence MUST be carrier-tail, not code-band: state that with complementary pairing the signed difference equals 4·Re(C-bar S-tilde) exactly at every z1 (measured 5e-16), so the 2k_p intensity-autocorrelation term cancels identically; the residual leak is the carrier-code cross-spectrum through the finite object window, with NO spectral edge at 2k_p. (Corrects WAVE_TWIN_REPORT §1's wrong attribution; forbids the report's current '2k_p tail' phrasing from entering the paragraph.)

Replace 'exactly zero beyond-band mean response' with: 'the mean channel is blind up to a calibrated residual obeying leak(z1)^2 = L_pix^2 + (z1/z*)^(2*beta), with L_pix = 6.8e-3 set by DMD pixelation and suppressed by near-conjugate relay imaging' — CONDITIONAL on tests 2-3 passing (decomposition + seed/M stability); if either fails, quote only the measured bracket [6.8e-3, 8.9e-2] over z1 in [0,20]mm. Never quote a mechanistic exponent the 1-20mm grid cannot discriminate.

State the leak as an asset, not only a defect: the calibrated leak is itself a scene witness in the contact configuration, and the leak operator is bench-measurable (one calibration run of the code basis) — enabling certified-blind code selection if test 4 passes.

Contact-null sentence (conditional on test 7): 'the relay-conjugate configuration (z2_eff = 0) is a built-in deterministic null — a pure phase medium leaves the bucket invariant as an identity — providing a self-calibration state and a hardware medium-veto arm.'

Two-wall sentence (conditional on test 1 arm ii): 'the code-algebra wall at the modulator plane is mirrored by an exact energy-conservation wall at the collection plane: phase-only changes are invisible to a lossless full-aperture bucket at every order, restored to first order by NA clipping — each wall softened by its own geometric conversion knob (defocus z1, collection NA).'

Robustness sentence: percent-level complementary-pair gain matching suffices — a 1% imbalance shifts the leak profile by <0.4% (the reintroduced |S-tilde|^2 term is buried under the carrier pedestal).

Prohibitions (measured kills): do NOT claim witness relocation beyond 2k_p helps (buys <=3.5x at z1=0, ~1x at z1>=5mm); do NOT claim pupil-plane code-band apodization restores the wall (measured 4-20x WORSE, rim effect); do NOT quote absolute wave-vs-sealed T_det gaps without the M-scaling correction (M^1.8; T5 ran M=32 vs sealed M=128 — t5b pending), and quote bank counts only at matched epsilon.
bench_design: Relay-conjugate DMD imaging (z1 ~ 0) as baseline geometry: kills the propagation term of the leak; a relay pupil freezes z1-sensitivity (measured: hard pupil makes leak z1-independent to 3 digits over 0-20mm); relay-NA spec to be read off the test-2 fit.

Calibration step (if test 4 passes): display the 120 in-band basis codes, record mean buckets against a scene basis to measure the bench's OWN leak operator L (including dither, nonlinearity, real envelopes); draw operating codes from its bottom singular subspace — certified blindness by calibration, not idealization.

DPSS/optimized render kernel + object window with witness at k in [12,14] (if test 5 passes) — coronagraph-grade concentration; stacks multiplicatively with the code subspace. All separable naive windows (rect, Tukey, Gaussian, hard pupil) are measured failures — do not improvise here.

Quadrant photodiode (P=4; option 4x4) segmented bucket (if test 6 passes): T_det ~ N_grains/P^2, recovering ~16x at P=4; MUST ship with the per-segment beyond-band mean-leak audit and a covariance estimator sized for the PM-dim statistic.

Flip-mirror contact arm: 4f relay conjugating the object plane onto the diffuser (z2_eff = 0) for the coincidence medium-veto and as the self-calibration/background state (if test 7 passes) — repairs the FA 0.096/0.084 specificity dent with an identity.

DMD grayscale rendering: pending test 8 — if spatial dither leaks >=1e-2, mandate PWM temporal dithering with bucket integration over exact whole dither periods + detector-linearity spec; otherwise drop the constraint.
Relaxed spec: complementary-pair gain matching to ~1% is sufficient (measured null) — no precision-matching hardware needed.

Operating point: mid-geometry z2 ~ 5mm for the covariance sentinel; avoid near-contact operation unless the coincidence logic is present (mean channel dominates there via the leak); coarse-medium sealed cells are unrealizable with the 2mm illumination aperture — do not chase them.

Anti-patterns (measured kills): no illumination stop-down to coarsen grain (unreachable regime + code amputation + 178x photon cost); no witness relocation beyond 2k_p; no pupil-plane code-band masks; no patch-illumination crops that break code band-limitation.
next_paper_ranking: 1. Restoring the wall by null-space code engineering (finer #3, + finer #4 hardware leg + the leak-law metrology of #2/#8/#9 as its calibration section): bench-certifiable blindness with a number attached — the sledgehammer, gated only by test 4.

2. Two-wall symmetry + jet-order invariance (higher #1): PRL-grade higher principle with a both-outcomes-publishable test; if the invariance VIOLATES, this jumps to rank 1 as a discovered geometric jet-order interpolation.

3. Segmented-bucket P^2 detection law (stranger #7): clean falsifiable scaling that closes the wave-vs-sealed speed gap while provably staying below any imaging threshold — strong standalone if the exponent survives with the mean-leak audit.
4. Contact-null coincidence specificity (stranger #6): repairs the campaign's only failed gate with an identity — likely a decisive section of paper 1 or 3 rather than standalone.

5. Memory-effect / rank interpolation between the Letter's endpoints: the direction remains the legitimate quarantined seed, but this round's registration was internally inconsistent (r_ME vs r_ME^2 exponent clash, rank capped at 24 by the scene basis) — reopen only with corrected exponent bookkeeping and a basis that can see the rank range.
6. Leak-law metrology alone (finer #2 + stranger #8 + nextpaper #9): real and cheap but transfer-paragraph/instrument material, not a standalone paper — fold into rank 1.
discards: I/Q Fresnel-rotation law — its cap leak<=1.05x floor contradicts the measured 13x growth; heterodyne phases (~3.8 rad) dwarf the claimed rotation (0.22 rad). Its one correct piece (4Re cancellation) survives inside finer #2.
Leaky Rank-Jet theorem — kill criterion rank>M+2 unsatisfiable by construction; the blindness projection annihilates the entire mean channel; contradicts T5's own use of the leak as signal.
Two-Fresnel-number phase diagram — governing scale wrong by >100x (no Talbot structure in the measured monotone leak); N_grains factor contradicted by flat lambda_mean across 23x grain change.
Diffuser-Fresnel-number 1D collapse — its own keystone check spreads 6.6-13x, not <1.5x; developed l_field is below the twin grid (dx=4um), so the prescribed measurement returns the pixel floor.

Matched-grain illumination stop-down — claimed grain regime unreachable by >10x with the stated apertures; reaching it amputates the code to a scalar; 178x photon cost unaccounted. Rising-branch salvage lives inside stranger #7 instead.

Small-z1 linear leak law — anchored on nonexistent sub-mm data; its perturbative premise breaks at 4.8 rad by 20mm. Its genuinely new part (floor-provenance decomposition) is exactly nextpaper #9, which we run as test 2.
Chromatic averaging of the leak slope — impossible by ~3 orders at the measured annulus frequencies (phase excursion 0.08 rad vs needed ~38 rad); lambda*z1 symmetry preserves the slope exactly.
Dual-ledger channel-switching via epsilon-invariant R — the invariance is falsified by the T5 JSON it cites (R drifts 10-21% over 2->5%, extrapolating 1.3-1.9x at 10%); plus a garbled ratio readout.

Channel-crossover range gating — sigma_lnR underestimated ~20-40x (needs ~1e6 banks, not 800); blind lambda_cov sits 600-9000x under the Wishart estimation floor. R(z2) trend stays a quarantine seed at 1e5-1e6 banks.

z1-diversity leak spectroscopy — kill criterion vacuous (constant classifier scores 75% vs the 60% bar); epsilon-amplitude fully degenerate with annulus; honest budget ~10x over claim. Constructive residue (leak as calibrated operator) folded into finer #3.

Rank-collapse interpolation as registered — claim and demanded theorem differ by a full power of r_ME; measurable rank capped at 24 by the 24-mode scene basis; direction re-quarantined (see next-paper rank 5).

F-pixel grain engineering — internal 1/F vs 1/F^2 contradiction; super-pixel windowing creates O(10-100%) beyond-band mean leak; estimator singular at F>=16. Superseded by stranger #7 with the corrected law + mandatory leak audit.

Spectral rank ladder — duplicate of the multi-kernel quarantined seed; ensemble kernel is nearly achromatic (rho ~ 0.985 vs required <0.3), so wavelengths buy copies, not rank; sigma_phi=8pi screen is unresolvable on the twin grid.

Physical-null recalibration manifold — the dented D3 nulls were fixed parametric drifts ON the physical manifold (rotation-rate change), so the mechanism removes nulls that never caused the dent and keeps every null that did; twin-threshold transfer is scale-incoherent.

Quarantine adjudication positive-control — the specified cell is signal-starved (detection AUC ~0.55), so position AUC 0.5 certifies nothing; in the toy the result is tautological. The no-compute housekeeping it proposed (retire the 453-bank bench target, per T5/M-scaling) is adopted administratively without a test.

Pupil-plane code-band apodization — RAN AND KILLED on the engine: every mask/cutoff combination worsens the leak 4-20x; mechanism identified as aperture-RIM aliasing, which now targets finer #3/#4 correctly. Result file retained in scratchpad.

Joint mean+covariance GLR firmware — additivity contradicted by the frozen T5 record in both directions at small lambda (plug-in noise, not channel dependence); the 'saved pools' its test needs were never saved.

Bucket-averaging design equation — grain closed-form has the wrong z2-trend sign vs T2; patch crops break code band-limitation so measured T_det stops certifying the sentinel; a narrow crop-axis salvage exists but is not this claim.

Amplitude-screen contact rescue — lambda ~ beta^2 wrong under the frozen convention (slope 4 shot-limited -> 0, never 2); fails its own 0.1x bar ~5x; contact stays mean-dominant, contradicting its application punchline. Beta-axis salvage quarantined.

Fast-medium diagonal-variance sentinel — its epsilon-ordering kill criterion demands the m=2 exponent for an m=1 signal (fires spuriously when the mechanism works); simulated regime (tau_c ~ tau_exp) is one its own premise declares unreachable. Reposeable with a within-exposure N-draws axis and corrected criterion.

Chen-bench protocol v2 write-up — kill threshold unreachable (lambda monotone in M already beats it at M=32), references a nonexistent 'sealed M-scaling factor', and would print an l_c^2 boundary scaling T4's own data refutes; the record-faithful constraint content is absorbed into the transfer_wording and bench_design lists above.
synthesis.missing_lens: All five lenses proposed physics and geometry; none proposed anything at the ESTIMATOR/READOUT layer — yet that layer is where the adversarial pass did most of its killing. Repeated kill mechanisms were not physical but inferential: blind lambda_cov estimation sits 600-9000x under the Wishart M^2/T noise floor (killed range gating and channel switching); the frozen plug-in W anti-orders the covariance channel at small lambda (killed the joint GLR); CRN/oracle-Delta-C quantities measured in the twin are unavailable to any bench observer; sealed thresholds do not transfer across engines (scale incoherence killed the recalibration idea); T5 pools are not even saved. The missing lens is "what can the bench actually estimate, blind": shrinkage/regularized covariance estimators sized to PM-dim statistics (which also gates the surviving segmented-bucket idea), sequential/anytime tests replacing fixed-T bank counts, threshold-transfer calibration protocols from twin to bench, and CRN-free noncentrality estimation. No idea in the round was GENERATED from that constraint — they were only killed by it. A sixth "blind-estimator" lens should run before the bench freeze, since every surviving quantitative claim (P^2 law, coincidence FA, certified leak <=1e-4) must ultimately be estimated, not oracle-read.

idea.title: Jet-order invariance: geometry moves prefactors, never contact order — except the exact collection-aperture null
idea.mechanism: The statistical theorem's contact orders (m=1 generic, m=2 curvature-rescued) are algebraic in epsilon. The twin's contact degeneracy looks like it might change m physically — it does not: at z2=0 the diffuser drops out of the bucket entirely (|E*e^{i phi}|^2 integrated = |E|^2 integrated), so the covariance channel's response vanishes at ALL orders in epsilon proportionally to the conversion factor, i.e. d'_cov(eps, N_D) = eps*g(N_D) + O(eps^2) with g -> 0 as N_D -> 0: the epsilon-jet order stays 1, only the prefactor carries geometry. The genuinely order-changing physical effect is elsewhere: a PHASE-only object change under lossless full-aperture collection is invisible to the bucket at every order and every moment (exact energy conservation — a second exact wall, at the collection plane, analogous to the code-algebra wall at the DMD plane), and a finite collection NA eta restores m=1 with prefactor = the clipped scattered fraction. So the system has exactly two exact walls (code algebra, energy conservation), each softened by its own geometric conversion knob (z1-defocus rotation, NA clipping) — a symmetric pair of principles.
idea.exact_claim: (i) log-log slope of d'_cov vs epsilon equals 1.00 at every z2 in {0.5, 1, 5, 20}mm (no geometric interpolation of contact order for reflectance changes), with intercept g(N_D) vanishing as N_D -> 0; (ii) for a phase-bump object change with full-aperture bucket, all measured moments of b respond at machine zero for every epsilon (exact null), while a bucket clipped to NA fraction eta responds at order eps^1 with d' proportional to the clipped scattered power.
idea.kill_test: On twin_pool.py: (i) epsilon sweep {1,2,4,8}% at 4 z2 values, 150-bank pools, fit log-log slope per z2 (kill if any slope leaves [0.9,1.15] with clear trend vs z2 — that would mean physical jet-order interpolation is real and idea 5 inverts into an even bigger finding); (ii) implement a phase-bump change and an aperture-clipped bucket in wave_twin.py (few-line change), verify the exact null (<1e-12 relative, deterministic) and its eps^1 restoration under clipping. Both engines exist at D:\GI_another\results\round63_next\WAVE_TWIN\.
idea.prior_art: That total-power detectors cannot see lossless phase objects is elementary; Fisher-zero contact analysis exists in quantum estimation. The pairing — two exact walls (code-algebra, energy-conservation) each with its own geometric softening knob, and the proof that scrambling geometry renormalizes prefactors but not jet orders — is not in the literature and directly hardens the frozen theorem's physical scope.
idea.payoff: Pre-empts the strongest referee attack on bench transfer ('your orders are model artifacts') with a measured invariance, and delivers a second exact wall that mirrors the first — upgrading the paper's single-wall narrative to a two-wall symmetry that is the kind of higher principle PRL rewards. Either outcome of test (i) is publishable: invariance confirms the theorem's physical form; violation would be a discovered geometric jet-order interpolation, bigger still.

idea.title: Carrier-cross exactness: the 2k_p autocorrelation term cancels identically; the leak is bilinear carrier-x-code, with no spectral edge at 2k_p (MEASURED — witness relocation does not restore an exact wall)
idea.mechanism: The DMD render in wave_twin.py is linear in the code, so with complementary pair a± = (1±s)/2 the propagated fields factor exactly as E± = C ± S̃ (C = propagated carrier field of the constant code 1/2, S̃ = propagated code field s/2), giving D = |E+|² − |E−|² = 4·Re(C̄S̃) EXACTLY at every z1. Verified in the twin at relative error 5.0e-16 (z1=10mm, complex128). Consequence: the classic intensity-autocorrelation term |S̃|² with support [0,2k_p] — the mechanism WAVE_TWIN_REPORT.md §1 blames — cancels identically in complementary differencing and is NOT the leak. The leak is the cross-spectrum Ĉ⋆Ŝ sampled through the finite object window: support = supp(Ĉ)⊕[0,k_p] + window aliasing, i.e. set by carrier/pixelation spectral tails with no hard edge anywhere. Measured annulus-resolved per-mode leak at z1=0: 5.29e-3 (k=6-7), 4.45e-3 (8-9), 3.81e-3 (10-11), 3.16e-3 (12-14), 2.41e-3 (15-18), 1.52e-3 (19-24) — smooth polynomial decay straight through 2k_p=10; at z1=5-10mm the profile is flat to k≈18. Bonus measured null: 1% complementary-pair gain imbalance changes the profile by <0.4% (5.31e-3 vs 5.29e-3) — the reintroduced |S̃|² channel is buried under the carrier pedestal, so percent-level gain matching is sufficient on the bench.
idea.exact_claim: For any linear render and any propagation distance z1 (unitary Fourier multiplier), the complementary signed intensity difference equals 4·Re(C̄S̃) exactly; hence the mean-wall leak spectrum has no support edge at 2k_p, witness relocation beyond 2k_p buys at most the carrier-tail ratio (measured ≤3.5x at z1=0, ≈1x at z1≥5mm), and pairing-gain imbalance δ≤1e-2 is invisible above the pixelation pedestal.
idea.kill_test: ALREADY RUN AND PASSED: scratchpad finer_t1.py on wave_twin.py (D:\GI_another\results\round63_next\WAVE_TWIN\), 55 s wall: exactness 5.0e-16; 6-annulus × 8-z1 deterministic sweep; δ=1e-2 imbalance probe. Results: D:\tmp\claude\E--ns-mc-gan-gi-code-fcc-phase1\04459650-b158-41b2-8bcd-cd575e323368\scratchpad\FINER_T1_RESULTS.json. Residual falsifier if desired: repeat at M=32 codes and grid 4096² to confirm grid-independence (~10 min).
idea.prior_art: Goodman statistical optics gives intensity-spectrum ⊆ twice the field band; differential/complementary GI (Ferri et al. 2010) uses pairing for noise cancellation. Neither states the exact bilinear factorization of the complementary difference nor that it deletes the 2k_p band from the leak budget of a certified-blind channel; the annulus-resolved falsification of witness-relocation is new and specific to our wall claim.
idea.payoff: Corrects the wrong mechanism sentence in WAVE_TWIN_REPORT.md §1 (quarantined report, not the frozen manuscript); rewrites the PRL transfer paragraph precisely: mean-channel blindness is carrier-tail-limited, not code-band-limited, and is robust to percent-level pairing imbalance; kills the cheap-looking 'move the witness beyond 2k_p' bench fix before money is spent on it.

idea.title: The mean wall is a LINEAR OPERATOR: build the 121x120 leak matrix per geometry, take its bottom singular subspace as the code space — certified mean-blind codes by SVD, and a self-calibrating bench version
idea.mechanism: Because D = 4Re(C̄S̃) is linear in the code s (proved/measured at 5e-16), the entire mean channel code→64-grid Jacobian is one linear operator L(z1): 120-dim in-band code basis (band_modes(1,5)) → 121-dim scene modes; the beyond-band leak of ANY code is ‖U_be^T L s‖. T1's 0.68–9% numbers are the leak of RANDOM band-limited codes — i.e. the typical singular value, not the minimum. Computing L column-by-column (120 renders + propagations, batched) and jointly SVD-ing the stacked beyond-band blocks [U_be^T L(z1_j)] over a z1 grid yields the code subspace with certified minimal leak UNIFORM over geometry tolerance; codes drawn from the bottom subspace could sit orders below the random-code floor while remaining in-band and full-rank for the covariance channel. Bench version is even better: L is directly measurable as a calibration (display the 120 basis codes, record mean buckets against a scene basis), so the bench can compute ITS OWN leak operator — including dither, nonlinearity, real envelopes — and restore a quantified wall by calibration rather than by idealization. This is NOT the dead detection-optimal-code line (which tuned covariance detection power and was inert ~3%): the objective here is certified blindness of the mean channel (null-space engineering), with covariance power checked as a constraint, not optimized.
idea.exact_claim: There exists a k-dimensional subspace of in-band codes (k ≥ 32) whose worst-case mean-channel beyond-band leak, jointly over z1 ∈ [0,10]mm, is ≤ 1e-4 relative — i.e. ≥60x below the random-code floor — while per-bank covariance noncentrality λ with these codes stays within 3x of random codes.
idea.kill_test: On wave_twin.py: build L(z1) for z1 ∈ {0,2,5,10}mm (120 columns × [1 render + 1 propagation], batched 16-wide, complex128, ~20 min); stack beyond-band blocks, SVD (instant); report leak spectrum of bottom-k subspaces for k = 8..64. Then covariance-retention: twin_pool.py/t5_sentinel.py reduced run (mid z2=5mm, l_c=50, M=32 SVD codes vs M=32 random, 200 banks, ~25 min) comparing per-bank λ. KILLED if bottom-64 joint leak ≥ 1e-3 (SVD buys <7x — floor is code-independent) or λ drops >3x (blind codes are covariance-dead).
idea.prior_art: Optimal linear measurement design / Backus-Gilbert / MacKay own generic SVD design; spectral-null line codes (Immink) shape code spectra for magnetic recording; our dead ROUND63 detection-optimal-code line owned covariance-power tuning. None of these certify blindness of a physically-realized bilinear channel through a measured calibration operator, and none address the carrier-cross + window-alias structure that makes naive band-limitation fail here.
idea.payoff: If it survives, this is the sledgehammer: the flagship 'image-blind, change-observable' claim becomes bench-CERTIFIABLE — the wall stops being an idealization broken by real optics (T1's headline dent) and becomes a computable, calibratable property with a number attached. Feeds the bench protocol (calibration step) and is the natural core of the next paper: 'restoring the exact wall by null-space code design'.

idea.title: No exact wall exists in finite-aperture optics — guard-gap concentration (Slepian/coronagraph co-design of macro kernel, pupil, and object window) is the only hardware route, and all three naive cures are now measured failures
idea.mechanism: Three naive wall-restoration attempts were run and all made the leak WORSE: (a) Tukey aperture apodization: 6-9 leak 0.222 vs 6.8e-3 standard (33x worse — the window's 4-unit spectral mainlobe smears in-band code across the 1-unit guard gap); (b) hard Chebyshev pupil κ_c=6 after the DMD: predicted exact support edge at κ_c+k_p=11 FAILED — 12-14 annulus stays at 8.4e-3 because the finite object-footprint window (block-sum crop) re-aliases the pupil's spatial ringing back into beyond-band measurement modes, though the pupil DOES freeze the z1 growth exactly (leak identical to 3 digits from 0 to 20mm); (c) Gaussian blur (pure Fourier multiplier): floor rises 2-3x by perturbing the floor's signed-cancellation state. Underlying principle: the measurement modes live on a 2.048mm footprint, so frequency resolution is 1 grid unit — the uncertainty principle forbids an exact wall at any finite guard gap; the achievable optimum is a joint spectral-concentration problem over (macro rendering kernel) x (pupil) x (object window), exactly the shaped-pupil/prolate-apodization problem solved in exoplanet coronagraphy, where 1e-10 contrast at few-λ/D offsets is routine. Import that machinery: DPSS/optimized windows on BOTH the code render and the object mask, witness moved to a Δ≈5-7 unit guard gap (k∈[12,14], still inside the T3 covariance aperture edge 27/20/13).
idea.exact_claim: With jointly optimized (linear-program shaped-pupil style) render kernel and object window and witness at k∈[12,14], the mean-wall leak is ≤1e-4 uniformly over z1∈[0,20]mm — exponentially small in the guard gap — whereas every separable naive choice (rect, Tukey, Gaussian, hard pupil) is lower-bounded near the measured 3e-3–2e-1 levels.
idea.kill_test: On wave_twin.py: implement DPSS (or LP-optimized) macro kernel + DPSS object window, witness annulus [12,14]; deterministic Jacobian sweep z1 ∈ {0,1,5,10,20}mm (same harness as scratchpad finer_t1b_pupil.py, which already contains the pupil/blur variants). KILLED if optimized-window leak at [12-14] fails to beat 1e-3 uniformly (i.e. <8x over the measured 8.4e-3 hard-pupil result) — that would mean the window-alias floor is not concentration-limited and hardware co-design is dead, leaving idea 3 (code SVD) as the only route.
idea.prior_art: Slepian DPSS concentration theory; shaped-pupil/apodized coronagraphy (Kasdin, Vanderbei; PIAA) owns pupil optimization for contrast at angular offset. Direct transplant to a bilinear complementary-difference channel with discrete macro-pixel aliasing and a certified-blind objective is new; the measured triple failure of naive windows is what makes the optimized version a sharp, non-decorative test.
idea.payoff: Settles whether hardware can restore the wall at all, with coronagraph-grade tooling rather than guesswork; the pupil's measured z1-independence alone is a bench design fact (a relay pupil freezes geometry sensitivity); a positive result stacks multiplicatively with idea 3's code subspace.

idea.title: Binary-DMD grayscale dithering breaks complementary cancellation — the likely dominant REAL-bench leak the twin doesn't model, and its exact cure (full-period PWM bucket integration)
idea.mechanism: The twin renders a± = (1±s)/2 as ideal grayscale amplitudes; a real DMD is binary, and grayscale requires spatial or temporal dithering. Dither quantization error e± is NOT odd under s→−s (e+ ≠ −e−), so it survives complementary differencing and adds a code-correlated broadband term to D that bypasses the entire carrier-cross structure. With 32µm macro-pixels ≈ 3x3 micromirrors, spatial dithering offers only ~10 gray levels — naive quantization error ~1/(2·√12·9) ≈ 1.6e-2 per macro-pixel, i.e. potentially 2x the entire measured z1=0 floor, with a white-ish spectrum that lands directly in every witness annulus and does not decay with k. The exact cure is temporal: PWM dithering with the bucket integrating over an exact whole dither period makes the time-averaged transmitted intensity exactly linear in the gray value, restoring the twin's linear-render assumption (leak contribution → 0), at the cost of exposure quantization and a detector-linearity requirement.
idea.exact_claim: Spatial 3x3-per-macro dithered rendering produces a mean-wall leak ≥1e-2, flat across k∈[6,24] and z1-independent (dominating everything measured in T1); exact-period PWM rendering restores the ideal-grayscale leak to within the twin's 6.8e-3 floor.
idea.kill_test: In wave_twin.py: add an ordered-dither/error-diffusion render at 8/3-px subcells (≈10.7µm ≈ mirror pitch) for both a+ and a−; rerun the deterministic z1=0 and z1=10mm Jacobian annulus profile (harness = scratchpad finer_t1.py, swap dmd_field). KILLED (as a bench threat) if dither leak <1e-3 — then dithering is a non-issue and the PWM requirement is dropped from the bench spec; confirmed if ≥1e-2 — then PWM + full-period integration becomes a hard line in the apparatus section.
idea.prior_art: DMD superpixel/dithering artifacts are known in beam shaping and holography (Goorden-Verstraten-Mosk superpixel method; Lee holograms). Nobody has propagated dither error through a complementary-differenced certified-blind channel; the non-cancellation observation and its PWM exactness cure are specific to our wall.
idea.payoff: De-risks the single most probable silent killer of the bench wall measurement before the collaboration builds anything; one sentence in the bench design doc either way, backed by a number.

idea.title: Contact-arm coincidence veto: the z2=0 degeneracy as a physics-enforced medium null that repairs specificity
idea.mechanism: T2 finding 1 is a deterministic OFF switch: at z2=0 a pure phase screen leaves intensity exactly invariant (|E e^{i phi}|^2 = |E|^2, contrast 0.001 measured), so in a relay (4f) arm that conjugates the object plane onto the diffuser, ALL medium statistics vanish from the bucket — medium events CANNOT produce a signal there, as an identity, not a calibration. But a scene (reflectance) change still reaches the contact arm through the mean channel, including beyond-band content via the T1 pixelation leak (floor 6.8e-3, lambda_mean ~1e-3/bank at near-contact in T5). Temporally multiplex a flip-mirror between the operating arm (z2=z_op, covariance sentinel) and the contact arm (z2_eff=0, mean-leak witness): coincidence logic 'operating-arm fires AND contact-arm fires' attributes to SCENE; 'operating fires, contact silent' attributes to MEDIUM and is vetoed. This attacks the exact dent in the frozen campaign — medium-event FA 0.096/0.084 vs the 0.05 bar — with a hardware null instead of the semiparametric/cross-fit statistical repair in quarantine, and doubles as the bench's self-calibration knob (contact arm measures the code+shot+instrument background with medium and covariance channels both disabled).
idea.exact_claim: In the twin, medium events (screen l_c or sigma_phi drift between epochs) produce contact-arm response statistically indistinguishable from H0 (AUC 0.5 +/- 0.03) while 5% scene changes give contact-arm AUC >= 0.8 at T<=2000 banks via the leak; the coincidence detector achieves medium-event FA <= 0.05 at scene-change power >= 0.9 x the single-arm power, where the single-arm covariance detector shows FA ~0.08-0.10 on the same events.
idea.kill_test: Extend twin_pool: generate three pools at z2_eff=0 (relay) and z2=5mm — H0, scene-change 5%, and medium-event (l_c 50->45um and sigma_phi 2pi->1.8pi variants). Compute per-arm statistics, build the 2D coincidence rule with thresholds set on H0 only, measure FA on medium events and TPR on scene changes by bootstrap. KILL if the contact arm responds to medium events above AUC 0.55 (the null is not exact in real diffraction — e.g. residual relay defocus modeled at 50um error), or if the coincidence rule costs >20% power, or if scene-change contact-arm AUC < 0.65 at T=2000 (leak too weak to witness).
idea.prior_art: Zernike phase contrast is built on the same invisibility of phase objects at conjugate focus, and nulling interferometry uses hardware nulls for starlight — but both are imaging modalities. Change-detection literature repairs specificity statistically (calibration sets, conformal thresholds). Using the conjugate-plane phase-invisibility as a deterministic medium-veto arm inside a bucket-only change sentinel, with the pixelation leak as the scene witness in that arm, is unowned.
idea.payoff: Directly repairs the campaign's only failed gate (medium-event specificity) with an argument reviewers cannot dispute (an identity, not a fit); adds one flip mirror to the bench; and supplies the transfer paragraph a sentence: the contact configuration is a built-in null test that disables the scene-covariance channel deterministically.

idea.title: Segmented-bucket P^2 law: invert the grain-averaging suppression with a quadrant diode
idea.mechanism: T5's root-cause finding is that the single bucket integrates N_g ~ 1e4-1e5 speckle grains, suppressing per-bank covariance noncentrality as lambda ∝ 1/N_g (measured 35x between l_c=15 and l_c=50, matching the grain-count ratio ~22) — this is why the wave bench is 27x-10^4x slower than the sealed 453 banks. Weaponize it: partition the detector into P segments (quadrant photodiode P=4, or 4x4 diode array P=16). Each segment sees N_g/P grains, so its relative covariance perturbation grows x P, giving lambda_seg ∝ P/N_g; stacking the P segment code-vectors into one PM-dimensional statistic multiplies by ~P quasi-independent blocks: lambda_tot ∝ P^2/N_g, i.e. T_det ∝ N_g/P^2. A quadrant diode alone recovers ~16x (mid-cell 2190 -> ~140 banks at 5%, near the sealed regime); P=16 recovers ~256x, attacking even the 2% cells. This is NOT imaging (P<=16 scalars vs 4096 scene DOF, rank-1 scene collapse untouched) and NOT the dead detection-optimal code design line (codes are frozen; only the photodetector is partitioned). It also shifts the idea-1 crossover toward contact (lambda_mean is P-flat since segment means sum coherently), widening the covariance channel's domain.
idea.exact_claim: At mid-geometry (z2=5mm, l_c=50, eps=5%): lambda_tot(P) scales with exponent 2.0 +/- 0.3 over P in {1,4,16} (log-log fit), T_det(P=4) <= 220 banks (vs 2190 at P=1), and lambda_mean(P)/lambda_mean(1) stays within [0.8, 1.5] — while saturation onset appears only when segment grain count N_g/P drops below ~10 x M_eff.
idea.kill_test: Modify twin_pool bucket stage only: before summing object-plane intensity, sum within P spatial segments (P=1, 2x2, 4x4), producing P signed buckets per code; stack into PM-dim vectors, apply the frozen conventions (sample covariance, matched score, lambda = 0.5 tr[(V^-1 dC)^2]) with M=32, N_BANK=800, at mid z2=5mm lc50 and near-contact z2=1mm lc50, eps in {2%,5%}. Fields already computed once per pool — segmentation is a re-reduction, so runtime ~ one T5 (9.5 min) plus overhead. KILL if the fitted exponent < 1.5 (inter-segment grain correlations eat the gain), if P=4 improves T_det by < 6x, or if the PM-dim covariance estimation cost (need T > PM samples) erases the gain at M=32 (then rerun at M=16 before killing).
idea.prior_art: Sun et al. (Science 2013) used 4 photodiodes for 3D computational GI — photometric stereo for IMAGING; multi-detector GI and SNR analyses (Ferri, Shapiro) treat detector count for reconstruction SNR, linear in P. The quadratic-in-P law for covariance CHANGE-DETECTION time, and the claim that P ~ 4-16 scalars closes the wave-vs-sealed gap while remaining below any imaging threshold, is not established anywhere.
idea.payoff: The single highest-leverage bench decision available: one cheap component (quadrant diode) converts the report's most damaging quantitative deviation (10^2-10^4x slowdown) into a solved problem, and the P^2 law itself is a clean, falsifiable scaling result for the next paper.

idea.title: Transfer-paragraph closure: replace 'exactly zero' with a calibrated leak law plus the built-in contact null
idea.mechanism: The only permitted manuscript surface is the bench-transfer paragraph, and the wave twin supplies exactly the two sentences it needs. (1) The mean wall becomes a LAW, not an apology: leak(z1) = L_pix + a*z1^p with L_pix = 6.8e-3 (DMD pixelation floor, deterministic) and p = 0.89 fitting all six measured z1 points within 7% — so the paragraph can state the mean channel is blind up to a calibrated, geometry-computable residual, suppressed by near-conjugate relay imaging, and that the leak is itself a usable witness (ideas 1,4). (2) The contact configuration (z2_eff=0 relay) is a built-in null: the scene-covariance channel switches off deterministically, giving the bench a self-calibration state (idea 3). Both statements are already twin-verified; wording them as laws converts the report's two honest corrections from defects into apparatus features without touching any frozen claim.
idea.exact_claim: The two-parameter fit leak(z1) = 6.8e-3 + a*z1^p reproduces all six T1 measurements (z1 = 0,1,2,5,10,20 mm) with max relative error < 10%, and the fitted (a, p) are stable (< 15% shift) under code-set reseeding and M in {8,32} — i.e., the leak is a reproducible instrument constant of the DMD geometry, quotable as a bound in the transfer paragraph.
idea.kill_test: Rerun t1_wall_leak.py at 3 code seeds x M in {8,32} (deterministic, no Monte-Carlo banks; each sweep is minutes), fit (a,p) per run, check dispersion and the 10% fit criterion. KILL the 'instrument constant' wording if (a,p) move > 15% across seeds or if any point misses the fit by > 10% — then the paragraph keeps only the min/max leak bracket [6.8e-3, 8.9e-2] already in the report.
idea.prior_art: None to own — this is wording discipline; the nearest hazard is overclaiming exactness the twin just falsified, which this replaces with measured constants.
idea.payoff: The frozen Letter's weakest reviewer surface (an idealized machine-zero claim) becomes a calibrated instrument specification with a citable null-test procedure, at zero risk to the frozen results.

idea.title: The mean-leak propagation law: decompose and fit L(z1), fix the manuscript's one open number
idea.mechanism: T1's leak is deterministic and monotone: 6.8e-3 at z1=0 rising to 8.9e-2 at 20 mm. Floor-subtracted (sqrt(L^2 - L_pix^2)) the data fit a power law z1^beta with beta ~ 0.73 over 1-20 mm — close to 3/4, suggesting Fresnel edge-diffraction at macro-pixel boundaries (amplitude ~ sqrt(lambda*z1)/a per edge) convolved with the 2k_p autocorrelation tail, not a generic quadratic defocus law. The floor itself has two separable parts: micromirror sinc envelope (fill 0.92) and macro-pixel hold. The twin can split all three deterministically in minutes because T1 is Monte-Carlo-free. This is the ONLY item allowed to touch the frozen manuscript (transfer paragraph): replace the placeholder 'residual leakage ... <= X' with a measured law L(z1)^2 = L_pix^2 + (z1/z*)^(2*beta), and give the apparatus spec (relay-conjugate DMD imaging + the NA at which the relay's own blur re-introduces an equivalent leak).
idea.exact_claim: The T1 leak decomposes as L(z1)^2 = L_pix^2 + (z1/z*)^(2*beta) with beta in [0.6, 0.85] and L_pix reproducibly split into a fill-factor term (vanishes at fill=1.0 within 2x) and a macro-pixel quantization term (scales ~1/a with macro-pixel size a); a finite-NA relay model gives leak < 1e-2 for NA >= a value the fit determines.
idea.kill_test: Rerun t1_wall_leak.py (deterministic, no MC) in four configs: fill=1.0; macro-pixel 64 um (2x); z1 grid extended {0.5, 3, 7, 15} mm for the fit; and a relay-conjugate variant with a Gaussian pupil of 3 NAs. KILL if the floor does not decompose (fill=1.0 changes L_pix by <20% AND 2x macro-pixel changes it by <20% — then the floor is a grid/band-limit artifact of the twin itself and the measured 0.7% floor cannot be quoted for the bench), or if no single beta fits 0.5-20 mm within 15%.
idea.payoff: The exact number and formula for the one sentence of the frozen Letter that may change; the relay-NA spec for the bench; immunizes the manuscript against a referee reproducing the leak. Cheapest item on this list with guaranteed nonzero payoff.
idea.prior_art: DMD sinc/pixelation artifacts are textbook (Lee holography literature); nobody has quantified their effect on a signed-code mean-channel NULL as a propagation law, because nobody else has a mean-wall claim to protect.
